data.name: 最凶暴的魔王大人女體化
data.detailed_description:
我告訴你！我可是男人中的男人！無可爭議的魔界之王！貝魯法露特！你！不許再用看女人的眼神看著我！ ！ ！ ！ ！哼~

膚若凝脂，前凸後翹，明眉皓目的少女發出了這樣的宣言...
眼前的少女，是曾經最最恐怖的魔王，用殘暴手段支配世界百年的魔界之王！貝魯法露特！
額..因為某種奇怪的原因，在和勇者進行最終決戰時，被變成了嬌嫩的娘們儿~
現在，被沒見過女人的飢渴勇者所俘獲

每天只能穿著エロ無比的各種騷衣服。向勇者發出上面那種不痛不癢的宣言..
變成少女的魔王沒有任何反抗能力，只能被大紳士勇者肆意擺弄。在床上擺出180個不同的造型啥的...
但是，隨著二人漸漸熟悉，在旅途中，她卻對這個滿腦子只知道各種H，只知道各種奇怪的玩法，各種羞恥的小道具的勇者產生了好感？ ？

總之，變成了娘們儿的魔王，以及滿腦子都是H的勇者！激情到懷孕的社保旅途！
充滿エロ的俘虜生活，開始了！ ！ ！



  • 官方漢化版。
  • 原裝日文語音。
  • 高清16:9和4:3 h圖。
  • 長達幾小時的內容。
  • 帶有音樂和音效。
  • 帶有角色動態。
  • 帶有收藏展覽。
  • 15個H景點。

「最兇暴的魔王大人女體化」由著名日本製作室 Norn/Miel所創作,並由櫻桃吻吻正式漢化, 把日本遊戲帶到全世界。

**注意**
所有角色的描述和圖片都屬成人並沒有任何未成年人物用於這遊戲裡。

data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 繁體中文

最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OSX 10.6+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Genderbend Me! Sayonara Demon Dong
data.detailed_description:
Ah, a tale as old as time. The hero with an OP ability faces off against the Demon Lord in a final epic battle and blah blah blah. We've all seen this before.

But WAIT, the Demon King, Bellfrud, has an ace up their sleeve; the forbidden spell EX-ET-QUAL-MASS-ACRE!, a sinister spell to drain the targets strength and bestow it to the caster. Too bad the hero's secret ability is to reflect all magic. Woops.

With Bellfrud's powers gone, replaced with some bouncy badonkers, their second in command, Zord, takes the chance to overthrow them and become the new Demon Lord! With their powers gone, Bell is shocked when the hero actually protects them from Zord's sneak attack and they set off on their own adventure to find a way to reverse the genderbendening, restore Bell's powers, and maybe discover the most powerful magic of all to help them defeat Zord... THE MAGIC OF LOVE!

For the first time in a Cherry Kiss game, the narrator isn't the male protagonist doing the fucking. Its Bellfrud/Bell coming to terms with becoming a lady and developing feelings for their once-foe-now-friend Claus the Hero.


  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • Bell/Bellfrud is fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Audio including music and special effects
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections
  • 13 scenes of of Bell enjoying their new body with you!

Genderbend Me! Sayonara Demon Dong is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Norn. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

**PLEASE NOTE**
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: Take on the role of the newly feminized Demon Queen and travel the world with the horny hero, looking for a spell to turn back into your original form and retake the throne of the demon realm!
data.supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese
